name: saurus-extension
description: A thesaurus-first, AI-second writing tool designed to keep you in the flow.

commands.title: Saurus: Suggest For Selected Text (With Prompt)

saurus.languages.description: Language IDs where Saurus is active.

saurus.thesaurus.timeoutMs.description: Timeout for thesaurus requests in milliseconds.

saurus.thesaurus.maxSuggestions.description: Maximum number of thesaurus suggestions to keep per placeholder.

saurus.ai.autoGenerateOnOpen.description: Automatically generate AI suggestions when opening a placeholder. When false, AI runs only via 'Generate/Get more AI options'.

saurus.ai.provider.description: AI provider used for suggestion generation. 'copilotChat' uses VS Code's built-in Copilot Chat API; the others use CLI tools.

saurus.ai.path.description: Path to the selected AI CLI executable. Ignored for 'copilotChat'. Leave empty to use provider defaults (codex, gh, claude).

saurus.ai.model.description: Optional model name. For 'copilotChat' this is treated as an id/family hint; for CLI providers it is passed to the CLI.

saurus.ai.reasoningEffort.description: AI reasoning effort. Lower effort is usually faster. For Claude, this maps to Claude Code effort env vars.

saurus.ai.timeoutMs.description: Timeout for AI requests in milliseconds.

saurus.menu.thesaurusPrefix.description: Prefix string shown before thesaurus entries.

saurus.menu.aiPrefix.description: Prefix string shown before AI entries.

saurus.cache.persistAcrossReload.description: Persist suggestion cache to disk and restore it across VS Code reloads.

saurus.cache.persistTtlDays.description: Number of days before persisted cache entries expire.

saurus.placeholderHighlight.enabled.description: Highlight placeholders in the editor so they are visually easy to spot.

saurus.placeholderHighlight.delimiterCol.description: Text color used for placeholder delimiters.

saurus.placeholderHighlight.textColor.description: Text color used for placeholder content.

saurus.prompt.template.default:
You are helping with literary prose revision. Provide ${suggestionCount} replacement options for the placeholder.

Return valid JSON only with this shape: {\"suggestions\":[\"...\"]}.
Keep options concise and stylistically consistent with nearby prose.
Prefer single-word replacements whenever they preserve meaning and tone.
For multi-word placeholders, include multiple single-word options (ideally at least half of the list).
Use multi-word replacements only when a single word would lose essential meaning or voice.
Do not return options semantically identical to the avoid list (at minimum avoid exact normalized matches).

Placeholder text:
${placeholder}

Context before:
${contextBefore}

Context after:
${contextAfter}

Avoid suggestions:
${avoidSuggestions}

Additional direction (optional):
${direction}
saurus.prompt.template.description: Prompt template used for AI generation. Supports ${placeholder}, ${contextBefore}, ${contextAfter}, ${suggestionCount}, ${avoidSuggestions}, ${direction}, ${fileName}, ${languageId}.

saurus.activation.modeOnEnter.description: Default suggestion mode when cursor enters/clicks into a placeholder. 'hybrid' shows both sources, 'ai' shows AI only, 'thesaurus' shows thesaurus only.

saurus.suggestions.count.description: Number of suggestion options to request.

saurus.autoTrigger.onCursorEnter.description: Auto-generate suggestions when cursor enters a placeholder.

saurus.context.charsBefore.description: Characters of context before placeholder to include in prompt.

saurus.context.charsAfter.description: Characters of context after placeholder to include in prompt.

saurus.problemFinder.prompt.template.description: Prompt template used for AI problem finding. Supports ${targetText}, ${contextLeft}/${contextBefore}, ${contextRight}/${contextAfter}, ${dismissedIssues}, ${issueCount}, ${fileName}, ${languageId}, ${scope}.

saurus.problemFinder.maxIssues.description: Maximum number of writing problems to request from AI per run.
